top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN gs.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM gasstations gs
WHERE gs.Country = 'Slovakia';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN gs.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM gasstations gs
WHERE gs.Country = 'Slovakia';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gs.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM gasstations gs
WHERE gs.Country = 'Slovakia';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gs.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM gasstations gs
WHERE gs.Country = 'Slovakia';

    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN gs.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM gasstations gs
WHERE gs.Country = 'Slovakia';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gs.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM gasstations gs
WHERE gs.Country = 'Slovakia';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gs.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM gasstations gs

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN gs.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM gasstations gs
WHERE gs.Country = 'Slovakia';
